tasks.label: Build All (CMake + cp313/cp314 wheels)
tasks.command: cmake --preset vs-release; cmake --build --preset build-release; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force python\pipeutil\_pipeutil*.pyd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; .\.venv313\Scripts\python.exe -m build --wheel; Remove-Item -Force python\pipeutil\_pipeutil*.pyd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; .\.venv314\Scripts\python.exe -m build --wheel
